name: Butterscotch Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crust: Cut butter into flour. Mix thoroughly. Add pecans and mix spread in a 13x9 pan or two pie plates.
2. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes. Cool.
3. Make the cheese filling: Mix together cream cheese and sugar. Add whipped whipping cream (or cool whip) and mix thoroughly. Spread on the cooled crust and chill in the fridge.
4. Prepare the butterscotch filling: Cook the pudding mix with milk, then cool. Spread over the set chilled cheese layer and chill in the refrigerator.
5. Make the topping: Whip whipping cream until foamy and add sugar. Whip until light peaks form (or use 1 9-ounce container of cool whip).
